description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear wireless headphones, featuring large, cushioned ear cups that fully enclose the ears for immersive sound isolation. The headband is broad and padded, with a secondary flexible support band for added comfort during extended use. The ear cups are predominantly matte black, with subtle orange accent rings outlining the outer edges, giving the headphones a modern and stylish appearance. Small physical buttons and ports are visible on the lower edge of one ear cup, likely for power, volume, and connectivity controls. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of plastic and metal components for durability and lightweight comfort. These headphones are suitable for personal audio use in urban environments, such as on public transport, in parks, or while walking through city streets.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear wireless headphones with cushioned ear cups, a padded headband, and orange accent rings. Features physical controls and a sleek matte black finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, cushioned ear cups and the dual-band headband design.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular ear cup with an orange accent ring and the broad headband.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical ear cups and the full width of the headband.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other ear cup with its orange accent ring and visible control buttons.
